# AiManager

## Ask

`POST /ai/ask`

**Request body** (`application/json`): `AiAsk`

**Returns:** `AiResponseFull`

**Example**

```go
result, err := client.Ai.Ask(context.Background(), &schemas.AiAsk{})
if err != nil {
	log.Fatal(err)
}
fmt.Println(result)
```

## GetAgentDefault

`GET /ai_agent_default`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|

